jobPostingInfo.title: Software Engineering Intern (AI/ML) - Remote US
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
Job Title

Software Engineering Intern (AI/ML) - Remote US


Location(s)

Waltham

About Us

Revvity is a developer and provider of end-to-end solutions designed to help scientists, researchers, and clinicians solve the world’s greatest health challenges. We pair the enthusiasm of an industry disruptor with the experience of a longtime leader. Our team of 11,000+ colleagues from around the globe are vital to our success and the reason we’re able to push boundaries in pursuit of better human health.

Find your future at Revvity

We are seeking a highly motivated and technically skilled individual with a strong understanding of software development, AI and business concepts to join our Internship Program as Software Engineering Intern (AI/ML).

This program offers a unique opportunity to gain hands-on experience in researching and applying Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) solutions to real-world business cases. Our Interns work closely with our experienced team members, contributing to innovative projects and gaining valuable insights into the intersection of technology and business.

Key Responsibilities May Include:

  • Research & Learning:

  • Conduct research on AI and ML technologies, trends, and applications in various industries

  • Learn about software development best practices and coding standards

  • Study different programming languages and development tools

  • Research software testing methods and quality assurance practices

  • Basic Development Tasks:

  • Write and debug simple code under supervision

  • Assist with testing software applications and documenting bugs

  • Help create basic user interfaces and simple web pages

  • Project Support:

  • Analyze business requirements and identify opportunities for implementing AI/ML solutions

  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to develop project plans and strategies

  • Help document software processes and create user guides

  • Support project planning and track progress on assigned tasks

  • Data & Analysis:

  • Evaluate the performance and effectiveness of implemented solutions through data analysis

  • Create basic reports and visualizations from data

  • Help clean and organize datasets for analysis

  • Assist with data collection and validation

  • Communication & Collaboration:

  • Communicate findings and recommendations to stakeholders in a clear manner

  • Participate in team meetings and present work progress

  • Work with mentors to learn new skills and technologies

  • Collaborate with team members on group projects

  • Support database tasks like data entry and basic queries

  • Participate in code reviews to learn from experienced developers

Basic Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's or master's Degree student, pursuing a Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Business or a Related Field

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Hands-on experience with relevant tools

  • Exceptional problem-solving and reasoning skills

  • Effective communication and teamwork abilities

Candidates must have the capability to Interview In-Person at our Headquarters in Waltham, MA USA.

Please include a valid LinkedIn profile and added work links, to your resume.

Fraud Prevention Notice: We are committed to a fair and transparent hiring process. All applicants must provide accurate and truthful information. Any use of impersonation, falsified identities, or AI-generated deepfakes will result in immediate disqualification from consideration. We conduct identity verification as part of our hiring process to protect both candidates and our organization.

#LI-TE

What do we offer?

We provide competitive and comprehensive benefits to our employees. Below are some highlights of our benefits:

  • Medical, Dental, and Vision Insurance Options

  • Life and Disability Insurance

  • Paid Time-Off

  • Parental Benefits

  • Compassionate Care Leave

  • 401k with Company Match

  • Employee Stock Purchase Plan

Learn more about Revvity’s benefits by visiting our Bswift page. Log-In instructions are provided towards the bottom of the Bswift page.

*For benefit-eligible roles only. Part-time and temporary roles may not be eligible for all benefits listed. Please reach out to your recruiter for more information.

Revvity is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to any characteristic or status protected by applicable federal, state, and/or local laws. If you are an applicant with a disability that requires reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process or are limited in the ability—or unable to use—the online application system and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact OpenJobs@revvity.com.
